summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Eliminative Logic Discovery Engine for Movie Game. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified - start screen shows new Training/Discovery instructions, game displays maximally dissimilar pairs (The Godfather vs Guardians of the Galaxy), results show 'New Discoveries For You' with 'Why you'll like this' snippets.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/game/start returns training_pool_size
Backend: POST /api/game/start returns has_sufficient_data flag
Backend: Movies from training pool have genre information
Backend: Initial pair has two different movies
Backend: Challenger is dissimilar to king (different genres/eras)
Backend: Fast reaction (<2s) gives +5 points base score
Backend: Average reaction (2-5s) gives +2 points base score
Backend: Slow reaction (>5s) gives +1 point base score
Backend: Super Like doubles the score (2x multiplier)
Backend: Skip gives 0 points
Backend: Skip keeps king if one exists
Backend: Can't Decide gives +2 points to both movies
Backend: Can't Decide keeps king if one exists
Backend: Full 10-round game returns discovery recommendations
Backend: Recommendations include why_youll_like snippets
Backend: Recommendations include genres array
Backend: Recency bias applied correctly (0.8x/1.0x/1.3x)
Frontend: Start screen shows Training/Discovery instructions
Frontend: Start screen shows new scoring rules (Fast=5, Average=2, Slow=1)
Frontend: Game displays maximally dissimilar movie pairs
Frontend: Skip and Can't Decide buttons present
Frontend: Results show 'New Discoveries For You' title
Frontend: Result cards show 'Why you'll like this' quotes
Frontend: Result cards show genres array
Frontend: Play Again button works
critical_code_review_comments: Game session storage is in-memory (game_sessions dict) - sessions will be lost on server restart. Consider persisting to MongoDB for production.
Dissimilarity calculation uses 40% genre weight, 30% year weight, 30% director weight - well balanced
Discovery recommendations use multiple strategies: genre match, director match, similar to king, fast choice similarity
why_youll_like snippets are dynamically generated based on match type (e.g., 'Directed by X, whom you love')
seed_data_creation: Test user gametest2 has 8+ movies in diary including The Godfather, Inception, Interstellar, Pulp Fiction, Fight Club, Forrest Gump, Guardians of the Galaxy, LOTR
context_for_next_testing_agent: Eliminative Logic Discovery Engine fully tested and working. Key features verified: (1) Training Pool uses ONLY diary movies, (2) Discovery Pool returns unseen movies with 'why_youll_like' snippets, (3) Dissimilar pairs work - The Godfather (1972 Drama) vs Guardians of the Galaxy (2014 Action/Sci-Fi), (4) New scoring: Fast(<2s)=5, Average(2-5s)=2, Slow(>5s)=1, (5) Recency bias: rounds 1-3 at 0.8x, 4-7 at 1.0x, 8-10 at 1.3x, (6) Super Like doubles score, (7) Skip=0 points, Can't Decide=+2 to both. Test user: gametest2@test.com / test123.
